title: Global Settings
description: Synchronize your Minecraft Settings over all instances on startup
body:
This mod synchronizes your minecraft settings globally on your PC! Never have to go through and adjust settings ever again, when creating a new instance.

How it works:
- It creates a file, that includes everything from the options.txt file.
- This file is only created or changed, when the button is pressed in the mods GUI.
- Upon Launching the game it checks, if there is a file, and if there is it takes these settings and copies them into your current instance
- This can be prevented by toggling it off in the settings menu

The settings menu is located to the right of the controls tab within the game options.
![Menu Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dfcc6cc5173fcdcabd9107ce1937540e9da958d.png)
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32409dba79aa7379dcbccd6a4f5f50daeb41929f.png)
